primary_sources: AFCARS (Adoption and Foster Care Analysis and Reporting System) - HHS
Child Welfare Information Gateway - Foster Care Cost Reports (2021)
GAO-21-303 - Foster Care: HHS Should Improve Oversight

foster_care_annual.source_rationale: HHS/AFCARS federal and state combined costs (placement, caseworker, administrative, services) average $33,000-$43,000 per child annually; log-normal reflects wide variation between kinship placements (~$20k) and specialized therapeutic foster care (~$60k+).
